prose: The fukui-reactivity analysis on formaldehyde was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'). The calculation was conducted in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The most electrophilic site was found to be the Carbon atom (atom 2) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.70839. The most nucleophilic site was the Oxygen atom (atom 1) with a Fukui f- index of 0.46742. The live output log for this calculation can be found at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpq2a99tta/live.json`.
